etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "tree") + 寸(寸) (cùn, "hand") = planting a tree -> 豆(豆) (dòu, "bean") added phonetically -> modern form combines 木 and 豊 into 壴 which can be misinterpreted as 壴 + 寸
etymology.interpretation: 尌 originally depicted the action of planting a tree with 木(木) (mù, "tree") and 寸(寸) (cùn, "hand") indicating the placement or planting process. The addition of 豆(豆) (dòu, "bean") gave it a phonetic layer, complicating its visual interpretation over time into the form recognized today.
